---
title: "writing"
pagetitle: "Writing — vlad chituc"
---

I have an (infrequently updated) newsletter which you can find [here](https://vladchituc.substack.com/). I don't write as much as I used to, but here's a collection of some of my favorite articles I've written throughout the years.

### highlights

[The Data Against Kant](http://www.nytimes.com/2016/02/21/opinion/sunday/the-data-against-kant.html), *The New York Times (February, 2016)*

[Would You Rather Lose Your Morals or Your Memory?](http://www.newrepublic.com/article/122516/would-you-rather-lose-your-morals-or-your-memory), *The New Republic (August 2015)*

[Talking Tofurkey with Cory Booker](http://www.thedailybeast.com/articles/2014/11/26/talking-tofurky-with-newly-vegan-cory-booker.html), *The Daily Beast (November 2014)*

[Want to Change Anti-Vaxxers' Minds? Show Them the Horrors of Disease](http://www.thedailybeast.com/articles/2015/08/08/want-to-change-anti-vaxxers-minds-show-them-the-horrors-of-disease.html), *The Daily Beast (August 2015)*

[Why We Fall For Fake Science](http://www.thedailybeast.com/articles/2015/05/23/why-we-believe-fake-studies.html), *The Daily Beast (May 2015)*

[The Moral Bankruptcy of Silicon Valley Asceticism](http://religiondispatches.org/the-moral-bankruptcy-of-silicon-valley-asceticism/), *Religion Dispatches (August 2015)*

[Gone Fishing](http://www.thenewjournalatyale.com/2011/12/gone-fishing/), *The New Journal (December 2011)*

### contributor pages

[The Daily Beast](http://www.thedailybeast.com/contributors/vladimir-chituc.html)

[The New Republic](http://www.newrepublic.com/authors/vladimir-chituc)

[Religion Dispatches](http://religiondispatches.org/author/vladimirchituc/)
